3111310.name: FOOTAGE BODYCAM
3111310.description:
RECORDED BODYCAM Is out now!

FOOTAGE REC is an ultra-realistic single player first-person shooter. It uses the latest technology of unreal engine 5 game engine with hyper realistic lighting and graphics. So it gives the player an immersive experience. Developed by one video game designer, aged 15. FOOTAGE REC is very inspired of BODYCAM and UNRECORD which are 2 bodycam games similar to FOOTAGE REC. the game has pushed the boundaries of real life and video games.

With Unreal Engine 5 technologies, players will experience a next-generation gaming experience that showcases the future of bodycam video games - stunning graphics, immersive sound effects, realistic ragdoll and death effects, as well as a new shooting and movement experience.

Prepare to dive into combat, plan strategies to destroy your enemies. Ultra-detailed environments allow for total immersion and in-depth tactics. Enjoy multiple maps to save hostages and clear out buildings full of enemies with different difficulties.

(GRAB ON RELEASE BECAUSE THE GAME MAY INCREASE IN PRICE ON BIG UPDATES LIKE MULTIPLAYER)

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
